Tip of the Day
The base chance to find FINE materials is 1/100, which you can increase with better gear and tools.

Best day ever!

The Jellyfishing net item is a crafted item.

Requirements

  • At least Fishing lvl. 28.
  • At least Foraging lvl. 28.

Attributes

Quality Attributes

+4% Work efficiency While doing Fishing.
+4% Work efficiency While doing Foraging.
+1% Double rewards While doing Fishing.
+1% Double rewards While doing Foraging.

+5% Work efficiency While doing Fishing.
+5% Work efficiency While doing Foraging.
+2% Double rewards While doing Fishing.
+2% Double rewards While doing Foraging.

+6% Work efficiency While doing Fishing.
+6% Work efficiency While doing Foraging.
+3% Double rewards While doing Fishing.
+3% Double rewards While doing Foraging.

+7% Work efficiency While doing Fishing.
+7% Work efficiency While doing Foraging.
+4% Double rewards While doing Fishing.
+4% Double rewards While doing Foraging.

+8% Work efficiency While doing Fishing.
+8% Work efficiency While doing Foraging.
+5% Double rewards While doing Fishing.
+5% Double rewards While doing Foraging.

+9% Work efficiency While doing Fishing.
+9% Work efficiency While doing Foraging.
+6% Double rewards While doing Fishing.
+6% Double rewards While doing Foraging.

Uses

This item may be equipped to your character.
